creator: ports@caomhin.org
text:
The project www/py-satchmo seems ever more abandoned with each passing week. The main site fell off the internet a long while back however the user group remained active and there was occasional activity on the repo, however in recent postings to the user group it has been essentially dropped by the original team now and nobody appears keen to step up to take over.

I see no purpose in the continued inclusion of this software in the FreeBSD ports framework and suggest it be removed, however should someone wish to take over maintaining the project I am happy to hand it over to them.
